headline: HSY Q1 Deep Dive: Volume Decline Offset by Pricing and Premium Expansion Initiatives
summary: Chocolate company Hershey (NYSE:HSY) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 10.6% year on year to $3.10 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.35 per share was 14.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
